notes: Categories are operational posting buckets, not ontology-pure merchant classes.
Terms are curated for new STREAMED-aligned categories; unmappable legacy categories were intentionally dropped.
Client-specific differences are expected to be handled by category_overrides and client_cache.

matching_contract.negative_filter: If any negative_term of the matched category is present in the same normalized field, ignore that category for this input.
